[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010111001 5
1 1100001011 5
2 0001111111 7
3 1011000011 5
4 1010111101 7
5 1111101011 8
6 0010111110 6
7 1101011001 6

01 10 0101110100 5
12 21 1111000111 7
23 32 1010110110 6
34 43 1011101100 6
45 54 1101110100 6
56 65 1010111100 6
67 76 0001100010 3
70 07 1101000011 5

13 31 0101110001 5
24 42 0001011010 4
35 53 0110011000 4
46 64 0111001000 4

60 06 1100100001 4
71 17 1000110111 6

14 41 1110011101 7

36 63 1100100100 4

50 05 0110011101 6
61 16 1001010101 5
72 27 0111110000 5

26 62 0110010010 4
37 73 1101000110 5
